challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: You should create a new p element below your element with the Total Fat text.
Your new p element should have the text Saturated Fat 1g 5%.
Your new p element should have a span element.
Your span element should have the class attribute set to bold.

description: Ispod vašeg elementa sa tekstom Total Fat, kreirajte novi p element sa tekstom Saturated Fat 1g 5%. Obuhvatite 5% u span sa atributom class postavljenim na bold. U ovom slučaju, ovo je dovoljno da poravna procenat na 5%.
